findings.description: The h2 section '主な仕様' contains 3 h3 subsections (ユーザ情報照会機能, ユーザ情報登録機能, ユーザ情報更新機能) with well over 2000 chars of plain text combined, but all 3 are merged into a single section s3 without splitting. Per V3 rules, when an h2 has >= 2000 chars AND h3 subsections exist, each h3 should be split into its own knowledge section.
findings.source_evidence: Source has h2 '主な仕様' with three h3 subsections: 'ユーザ情報照会機能', 'ユーザ情報登録機能', 'ユーザ情報更新機能'. The combined plain-text content of these three subsections far exceeds 2000 characters. The automated pre-check also flagged 'Section count 4 < source headings 8'.
